data.body: AC3 COMPLETE: merge change 215 got Verified=MAX. CI job log CONFIRMS it fetched refs/changes/15/215/1 (= merge commit 2533a353, the MERGE TREE — 2 parents), all 3 CI matrix jobs passed (ubuntu 3.11/3.12, macos 3.12), 'require resolvable rebar ticket' passed, then 'cast Verified' -> +1. So a merge change gets CI on the actual merge tree via the merge refspec and earns Verified. Run: github.com/navapbc/rebar/actions/runs/28654010839.
